market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Tennessee Bankers Association names Stablecore as preferred digital asset provider
articles.description: Regional lenders gain access to infrastructure for stablecoins, tokenized deposits and crypto-backed lending without building systems in-house, signaling wider bank adoption.

articles.title: Drift outlines a recovery plan for users after $295 million DPRK-linked exploit
articles.description: The lending protocol proposed tokenized claims, a revenue-backed pool and a security overhaul as it works with law enforcement to recover the stolen funds.

articles.title: Tokenization won't disrupt banking rails but improve them, Wall Street executives say
articles.description: Executives from Citigroup, JPMorgan and DTCC said at Consensus that genuine client demand is driving real-world use of tokenized assets.

articles.title: Bitcoin extends gains to $81,500 as tokenization push lifts Bullish, Galaxy, Centrifuge
articles.description: Crypto market momentum could extend further unless geopolitical risks flare up again, one analyst said.

articles.title: Crypto Fear and Greed Index turns neutral for first time since January: Is $100K BTC next?
articles.description: Improving investor confidence supports Bitcoin’s hold on $80,000, as the Crypto Fear and Greed Index exited the “Extreme Fear” zone and now reads “neutral.” Are the bulls back in control?

articles.title: Airbnb co-founder taps Peter Arnell as first US chief brand architect
articles.description: Arnell joins Gebbia’s National Design Studio under Trump to unify UX across 27,000 federal sites and streamline how Americans use government services.

articles.title: US prosecutors ask for leniency for ex-Celsius exec, citing cooperation
articles.description: While Roni Cohen-Pavon’s lawyers have asked for time served, US Attorney Jay Clayton was unspecific in the federal government’s recommendation, requesting the judge defer to sentencing guidelines.

articles.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
articles.description: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.

articles.title: Rep. Steven Horsford pitches PARITY Act as 'durable floor' for crypto tax at Consensus Miami
articles.description: The Nevada Democrat told Professor Yesha Yadav that incremental, bipartisan reform is the path forward as Senate negotiations on the CLARITY Act stall.

articles.title: Solana’s 'Alpenglow' upgrade could arrive next quarter, co-founder Yakovenko says
articles.description: Speaking at Consensus Miami 2026, the Solana co-founder said that he is excited to see 'Alpenglow' upgrade go live later this year, which could come as early as next quarter.

articles.title: Western Union’s Solana-based stablecoin could reshape its payment model, analyst says
articles.description: Western Union launched USDPT, a dollar-backed stablecoin on Solana, issued by Anchorage Digital Bank, for 24/7 settlement with agents and partners.

articles.title: Figure targets Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac in mortgage push, citing massive cost cuts for borrowers
articles.description: The firm offers rapid service, targeting the sub-$300,000 loan segment, with HELOC applications approved in 5 minutes and funding in 3 days.

articles.title: Bernstein cites $4T tokenized credit opportunity for Figure Technology stock
articles.description: Bernstein points to Figure’s expansion beyond home equity lending into blockchain-based credit, as tokenization begins to scale across broader loan markets.

articles.title: XRP price copies 2025 chart fractal that last time sparked 66% gains
articles.description: XRP price broke out of a multi-month bull flag, while other chart technicals are also supporting more upside in the near term.

articles.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
articles.description: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

articles.title: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse says Clarity better than chaos as Senate hits key moment
articles.description: The crypto market structure Clarity Act needs to get to its next step,  a Senate hearing, this month to have a reasonable chance, Garlinghouse said.

articles.title: PayPal says it’s ‘becoming a technology company again’ — that means AI
articles.description: PayPal is pitching an AI-led turnaround, tying automation and restructuring to $1.5 billion in savings as it cuts jobs and works to modernize its tech stack.

articles.title: Etsy launches its app within ChatGPT as it continues its AI push
articles.description: Etsy's new native app within ChatGPT aims to be a conversational  shopping experience for users.

articles.title: Wall Street warns human-built markets can’t keep up with machine-speed trading
articles.description: Legacy financial systems face pressure as tokenization and real-time trading push markets toward always-on, automated infrastructure, panelists at Consensus in Miami said on Tuesday.

articles.title: Crypto's value is from being outside regulatory apparatus, says Arthur Hayes
articles.description: All that matters for bitcoin’s value proposition is fiat liquidity, said Arthur Hayes, CIO of Maelstrom, at Consensus Miami 2026.
